doc:
Pure-TS port of MPFR's mpfr_clear_inexflag (mpfr/src/exceptions.c L184-L190). Three-line C body: `__gmpfr_flags &= MPFR_FLAGS_ALL ^ MPFR_FLAGS_INEXACT` -- clear the INEXACT bit (bit 3 = 8). C returns void.

The TS port follows the immutable flag-family contract. In-library wiring: clearFlags(MPFR_FLAGS_INEXACT).

Class 'misc'. Tag minimums per Rule 7 apply.
divergence_from_c: Three: (1) void -> bigint; (2) void -> mask:bigint; (3) `mask & (63n ^ 8n) = mask & 55n`.
